hero.subheadline: Accept payments from anywhere in the world — PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Orange Money, MTN MoMo and more. Fast, secure, and reliable.

features.subheadline: Built for businesses of all sizes — from startups to enterprises across Africa and beyond.

secure.title: Secure Payments
secure.description: Bank-level encryption and fraud detection keep every transaction safe and protected.

fast.title: Fast Transactions
fast.description: Payments processed in seconds — no delays, no waiting, just instant results.

global.title: Multi-Currency Support
global.description: Accept payments in multiple currencies from customers around the world.

mobile.title: Mobile Friendly
mobile.description: Fully optimized for mobile — your customers can pay from any device, anywhere.

howItWorks.subheadline: Getting started with NexaPay is quick and easy. No technical knowledge required.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Sign up for free in minutes. No paperwork, no hidden fees — just create your account and you're ready to go.

step2.title: Choose a payment method
step2.description: Select from PayPal, Orange Money, MTN MoMo and more. We've got every payment method covered.

step3.title: Pay instantly
step3.description: Complete your payment in seconds. Fast, secure, and reliable — every single time.

pricing.subheadline: NexaPay charges a single flat rate per successful transaction. No monthly fees. No setup costs.

footer.tagline: One gateway. Every payment. Built for Africa and beyond — fast, secure, and reliable.
footer.builtWith: Built with ❤️ for Africa & the world.

hero.desc: NexaPay was born from a simple frustration — why should African developers spend months integrating payment systems that should take hours?

mission.title: Democratizing payments across Africa
mission.body1: We believe every African business — from a solo founder in Yaoundé to an enterprise in Lagos — deserves access to world-class payment infrastructure. NexaPay levels the playing field.
mission.body2: Our platform connects Mobile Money networks, international card processors, and digital wallets through a single, unified API. Build once, accept payments everywhere.

speed.title: Speed First
speed.desc: Every millisecond counts. We obsess over performance so your customers never wait.

security.title: Security by Default
security.desc: Bank-grade encryption and fraud detection built into every transaction.

africa.title: Africa at Heart
africa.desc: Built specifically for African markets — Mobile Money, local currencies, local needs.

developer.title: Developer Obsessed
developer.desc: Clean APIs, great docs, and tools that make integration a pleasure not a pain.

team.title: Who Builds NexaPay
team.desc: A passionate team of engineers, designers, and fintech experts united by one goal — making payments work for Africa.

cta.desc: Join hundreds of African businesses already processing payments with NexaPay.

hero.subtitle: Whether you're a developer with a question, a business exploring NexaPay, or just curious — we're here.

sales.title: Sales
sales.desc: Interested in NexaPay for your business?

form.title: Send us a message
form.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
form.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.errorNetwork: Could not send message. Please try again.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.desc: Thanks for reaching out. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

solutions.title: Choose a Payment Method
solutions.subtitle: Select the payment solution that works best for you

methods.paypal: Pay securely with your PayPal account
methods.visa: Pay with your Visa credit or debit card
methods.orange: Pay with Orange Money mobile wallet
methods.mtn: Pay with MTN MoMo mobile wallet

hero.subtitle: NexaPay charges a single flat rate per successful transaction. No setup fees, no monthly fees, no hidden costs.

means.title: Pricing built for builders
means.subtitle: No complexity. Just a fair cut on every successful payment.

card1.title: Pay Only on Success
card1.desc: You are never charged for failed or pending transactions. NexaPay only earns when you earn.

card2.title: Full Transparency
card2.desc: Every transaction shows a complete fee breakdown — gross amount, NexaPay fee, and net amount you receive.

card3.title: No Lock-in
card3.desc: No contracts, no commitments. Start processing payments today and scale at your own pace.

calc.title: See exactly what you pay
calc.subtitle: Enter a transaction amount to see the fee breakdown.
calc.label: Transaction Amount (XAF)
calc.note: All amounts in XAF · Fee = max(1.5% of merchant amount, 50 XAF)

channels.title: Same rate across all channels
channels.subtitle: 1.5% applies to every payment method — no premium for international payments.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about NexaPay pricing.

items.a: Only when a transaction is successfully completed. Failed or pending transactions are never charged.

items.q: Is there a minimum transaction amount?
items.a: The minimum NexaPay fee per transaction is 50 XAF. This applies to very small transactions where 1.5% would be less than 50 XAF.

items.q: Are there any setup or monthly fees?
items.a: No. NexaPay is completely free to set up and there are no monthly fees. You only pay when you earn.
NexaPay charges 1.5% of the transaction amount. The fee is added on top of the merchant amount — so the customer pays the gross amount and you receive the net.
Yes! Merchants processing high volumes can contact us to negotiate custom rates.

cta.desc: Set up your account in minutes. No paperwork, no waiting.

developerOverview.title: Welcome,
developerOverview.subtitle: This is your NexaPay developer portal. Manage your API keys, read the docs, and integrate payments into your app.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.desc: Get up and running with NexaPay in minutes. Grab your API key and follow the integration guide.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.desc: View and manage your API keys to authenticate requests to the NexaPay API.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Full reference of all NexaPay API endpoints, parameters, and responses.

snippets.title: Code Snippets
snippets.desc: Ready-to-use code examples in JavaScript and TypeScript to integrate NexaPay fast.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.desc: Get notified in real time when payments succeed or fail in your application.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Use your API keys to authenticate requests to the NexaPay API. Use the test key for development and the live key for production.

testKey.title: Test API Key
testKey.desc: For development & testing — no approval needed
testKey.notice: Test transactions are marked as TEST and processed through sandbox. No real money moves.

liveKey.title: Live API Key
liveKey.lockNotice: Your live key is ready but will only work after your business is approved by our team.

regenerate.title: Regenerate Live Key
regenerate.desc: If your live key is compromised, regenerate it immediately. Your old key will stop working right away.
regenerate.confirm: Are you sure? Your old live API key will stop working immediately.
regenerate.errorNetwork: Something went wrong. Please try again.

webhooksPage.title: Webhooks
webhooksPage.subtitle: Get notified in real-time when payments are completed or failed.

endpoint.title: Webhook Endpoint
endpoint.desc: NexaPay will send a POST request to this URL after every payment event.
endpoint.label: Webhook URL

secret.title: Webhook Secret
secret.desc: Use this secret to verify that webhook requests are coming from NexaPay. Check the X-NexaPay-Signature header on incoming requests.

payload.title: Payload Example
payload.desc: This is what NexaPay sends to your endpoint on a successful payment.

logs.title: Delivery Logs
logs.emptyHint: Logs will appear here after your first payment.

codeSnippets.title: Code Snippets
codeSnippets.subtitle: Copy-paste examples to integrate NexaPay into your app. Replace npk_live_your_api_key_here with your actual API key from the API Keys section.

snippets.label: Initialize Mobile Money Payment
snippets.desc: Initialize an MTN or Orange Money payment from your backend.

snippets.label: Verify Payment After Redirect
snippets.desc: Called on your success page when the customer returns after payment.

snippets.label: Initialize PayPal Payment
snippets.desc: Create a PayPal order and capture it using the PayPal JS SDK.

snippets.label: Next.js API Route Integration
snippets.desc: Proxy NexaPay calls from your Next.js backend to keep your API key secure.

snippets.label: Verify Webhook Signature
snippets.desc: Verify that incoming webhook requests are genuinely from NexaPay.

snippets.label: Flutter Integration
snippets.desc: Integrate NexaPay in your Flutter mobile app.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.desc: Use email or service to create account

dashboardOverview.subtitle: Here's an overview of your payment activity on NexaPay.

adminOverview.subtitle: Platform-wide stats across all merchants and transactions.
